title: Enforce structured output with JSON schema + response prefill in delegation prompts
source: Anthropic prompt engineering docs — 'Increase output consistency' (prefilling responses + explicit JSON schema); established 2025-2026 best practice for agentic parsing
description: Morty sub-agent results are currently parsed from free-form text, which is brittle when a `claude -p` subprocess wraps output in prose or markdown fences. Define explicit output schemas and instruct agents to emit a single fenced JSON block, then prefill the assistant turn with the opening token to force schema adherence. Reduces parse failures and retries.
proposed_changes: In schemas.py add a `DELEGATE_RESULT_SCHEMA` dict (fields: status, summary, files_changed, blockers, next_steps). In delegate.py, append the schema to the delegation prompt with an instruction 'Respond with exactly one ```json block matching this schema and nothing else', and when invoking `claude -p` add a prefilled assistant hint ('```json\n{') where supported. Wrap the parse in a schema-validating helper that retries once with a 'your last output failed schema validation' correction prompt before falling back to text parsing.
reject_reason: Apply failed: Evolve delegation failed: (no stderr)
